creator: rmacklem@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


I'm pretty sure this crash was fixed by r259765, which has 
been MFC'd to stable/9 as r261061. It was specific to an 
NFSv2 mount and the stack corruption only seemed to affect i386. 

If you experience a similar crash with an up-to-date stable/9 
or 9.3 system (when released), please submit another PR.
